channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 12 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-59726 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 10.0
Resumo:
Ruflo is an agent meta-harness for Claude Code and Codex. Prior to 3.16.3, ruflo's default docker-compose deployment exposed the MCP bridge POST /mcp and POST /mcp/:group endpoints without authentication, allowing an unauthenticated network attacker to invoke tools/call to terminal_execute, obtain a shell in the bridge container, read provider API keys, and poison AgentDB learning-store patterns.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59726
 
🚨 CVE-2026-33382 - Grafana
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Several Grafana API endpoints, some of them unauthenticated, do not limit the size of the request body before processing it. An attacker can send very large payloads that force excessive memory allocation, potentially exhausting memory and causing a denial of service.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33382
 
🚨 CVE-2026-52747 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
ModSecurity is an open source, cross platform web application firewall (WAF) engine for Apache, IIS and Nginx. Prior to 3.0.16, the multipart/form-data request body parser in libmodsecurity silently removes embedded line breaks from non-file form-field values before exporting them to ARGS and ARGS_POST because src/request_body_processor/multipart.cc overwrites reserved bytes in m_reserve instead of appending the curr...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-52747
 
💣 Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Docker. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CVE-2026-39246 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
decompress before 4.2.2 allows arbitrary symlink creation during archive extraction. When processing symlink entries (type === 'symlink'), the x.linkname field from the archive is passed directly to fs.symlink() without validation (index.js line 121). The preventWritingThroughSymlink check on line 98 only applies to file entries, not symlink creation. An attacker can craft an archive with symlink entries pointing to...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39246
 
🚨 CVE-2026-34219: AI Agents Expose Ethereum Gossipsub Flaw - Cryptonews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-34219 associada a SentinelOne. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxPa3hEUjFVc24weDBaODZDZHF1VVc0dlpsRGRKYk1zMi1waWhDYnNHR1VsLXdaYnZvWm0wX3QxeDU4eG9USHRFaUNVd0t4aVM2NERNSDNmVTFqQ1VvUHVxN25aQlVKYjFDVDJUenN5b0xfV3MzN3B0aFlmUkU0VkowRmxB?oc=5
 
💣 Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in the official Docker image for the Gitea self-hosted Git service that allows attackers to impersonate any user, including administrators.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-critical-auth-bypass-in-gitea-docker-image/
 
💣 Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) issued an alert about a global exploitation campaign targeting vulnerable content management systems (CMS) and plugins.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/australia-warns-of-global-campaign-targeting-vulnerable-cms-platforms/
 
📰 Critical Zimbra Flaw Could Let Crafted Emails Run Malicious Code in User Sessions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Zimbra is urging customers to apply updates to address a critical security vulnerability impacting the Classic Web Client that could result in arbitrary code execution. The vulnerability has been described as a case of stored cross-site scripting (XSS) that could allow specially crafted emails to execute malicious scripts in a user's session.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/critical-zimbra-flaw-could-let-crafted_0483473395.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-13492 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The UsersWP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Deletion in versions up to, and including, 1.2.65. This is due to insufficient validation of file-field values in the UsersWP_Validation::validate_fields() function (which falls through to sanitize_text_field() for fields of type 'file', leaving directory-traversal sequences intact) combined with the UsersWP_Forms::upload_file_remove() AJAX handler buil...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-13492
 
🚨 USN-8526-1: libheif vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Xianrui Dong discovered that libheif had an out-of-bounds read in its HEIF sequence track parser. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service or obtain sensitive information. (CVE-2026-47254) Junyi Liu discovered that libheif had a null pointer dereference in its image tiling interface. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2026-47709) Calvin Young and...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8526-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-58198 - Ubuntu
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
ChatterBot is a machine learning, conversational dialog engine for creating chat bots. Prior to 1.2.14, UbuntuCorpusTrainer.extract() uses a predictable home-rooted output directory (~/ubuntu_data/ubuntu_dialogs) with a check-then-create pattern followed by tar.extractall(path=self.data_path), allowing a local attacker who pre-plants a symlink at the predictable path to cause archive contents to be written through th...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58198
 
🚨 CVE-2026-61448 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Parse Server is affected by a stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in versions >= 9.0.0, < 9.10.0-alpha.2 and <= 8.6.83. When an uploaded file's extension is not recognized by the mime package, Parse Server preserves the client-supplied Content-Type. A malformed Content-Type that is not a valid type/subtype media type (e.g., 'image', 'image/', or 'image//svg+xml') bypasses the fileUpload.fileExtensions blo...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-61448
 
💣 How Brad Stevens set the Celtics up to exploit rival teams next summer - Hardwood Houdini
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxOR2xKSlJ1eDJpVGRtNkYzV2FZbG9HakZPMV84X183TmFKUnpNU01OR2Jnd3ZOeXFfSThHUi1iVmQtcmJIeTBYZmdROFp2eVp1aG5scU5LNWptV2dPaElkVTktenRDVTVuVTNDSS1LUUtzYTRFYWlBd0ZURmZNelNsLXhZZzBhUXM5S3VWdzJnR0VyQQ?oc=5
 
💣 Microsoft 365 in the Crosshairs: $2.5 Million Zero-Day Exploit Up for Auction - Red Hot Cyber
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 2.5
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxPb282VHozZFlkb2d4aDJJcW84OTRtTmlFQWtRRV82Q0wwLWdnNWlzXzJjVTM3Y1d0N1ZLb3ZPRGlma3pkbDZmVExYTUdTSWplZFJqclNFZ0JnRkVvOWgyQTNqN2FqVEppOUo4VmFiNHFqT3Joa1UzMHplTkNqSVgxQmF1WS0yN0JGVkVQNm9IcHVoTEQ5a05nVmZZUTh2QlMySHN0Q3l6WnRRcmZTNTBlODJ3?oc=5
 
📰 Forg365 Phishing Platform Using AI to Attack Microsoft 365 Accounts - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 WP-SHELLSTORM: Operação expõe falhas de segurança no WordPress - SempreUpdate
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a WordPress no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMie0FVX3lxTE8yVU1KZ2s2SFNYaXVEd3FhODBadkdYTFVfeG9jMl9fSFU5TF9sejMzVU5tVlV5eDRlUUdmWnk5WGowNzZTQkxxelBtLW81ZDlUbWdySHVaSTNTUGJjWEpOdkE0QUdUZXdDdllQSlprcEdybkRGNUF3TnZCQQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 09/07/2026 até 11/07/2026.
